title: Create: Cog and Walls
description: Create modpack for Release Slow SMP
body:
Create based modpack for RELEASE SLOW smp,

based on fxnt create: 

-~{
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fxnt-create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fxnt-create)
}~-

Name meaning:

Cog- create

Walls- decoration mods, such as framed blocks

_**this mod is suggested, but cannot be in the modpack due to copyright permissions**_

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything)

-copyright-
